# AcneSafeCheck

> AcneSafeCheck is a free web tool that checks any skincare or makeup ingredient list (INCI) for comedogenic (pore-clogging) ingredients. Paste a product's ingredients and it flags each one on the 0–5 comedogenicity scale, separating pore-clogging risks from acne-safe ingredients. It runs against a database of 550+ ingredients, requires no signup, and works entirely in the browser. Ratings are based on published comedogenicity references (e.g. Fulton et al. 1984) and are informational, not medical advice.

## What it answers
- "Is this product acne safe?" — paste the ingredient list to find out.
- "Which ingredients clog pores / are comedogenic?" — each recognised ingredient is rated 0 (non-comedogenic) to 5 (highly pore-clogging).
- "Is [ingredient] comedogenic?" — look it up; each ingredient has its own page with rating, fungal-acne status and acne-safe alternatives.
- "Does [diet/lifestyle factor] cause acne?" — evidence-based articles on dairy, milk, sugar, whey, creatine, chocolate, stress, sweat, coffee, biotin and more.

## The comedogenic scale (0–5)
- 0 = non-comedogenic (acne safe), e.g. squalane, glycerin, niacinamide, hyaluronic acid, hemp seed oil, argan oil.
- 1–2 = low risk, e.g. jojoba oil, olive oil, cetyl alcohol, dimethicone.
- 3–5 = pore-clogging risk, e.g. isopropyl myristate (5), coconut oil (4), cocoa butter (4), algae extract (5), lauric acid (4), acetylated lanolin (4), myristyl myristate (5), wheat germ oil (5).

Note: a comedogenic rating is general guidance compiled from widely-used reference lists, not a lab result for every formula. Actual effects depend on concentration, the full formulation and the individual's skin. The tool is informational and not medical advice.

## Tools
- Home / acne safe ingredient checker: https://acnesafecheck.com/
- Comedogenic ingredient checker (rate a full INCI list 0–5): https://acnesafecheck.com/comedogenic-ingredient-checker.html
- Pore-clogging ingredient checker (flag breakout triggers): https://acnesafecheck.com/pore-clogging-ingredient-checker.html
- Fungal-acne (Malassezia) safe checker: https://acnesafecheck.com/fungal-acne-safe-checker.html
- Product checker (search a product by name): https://acnesafecheck.com/product-checker.html

## Ingredient database
- Searchable comedogenic ingredients list (550+): https://acnesafecheck.com/comedogenic-ingredients-list.html
- Full A–Z ingredient index: https://acnesafecheck.com/ingredients.html
- Individual ingredient pages live at https://acnesafecheck.com/ingredient/<slug>.html (e.g. /ingredient/coconut-oil.html), each with the 0–5 rating, what the ingredient is, fungal-acne status, and acne-safe alternatives.

## Concepts
- What "comedogenic" means and how to read the 0–5 scale: https://acnesafecheck.com/comedogenic.html
- Fungal acne (Malassezia) explained: https://acnesafecheck.com/fungal-acne.html

## "Does X cause acne?" articles (evidence-based)
- Hub: https://acnesafecheck.com/acne-causes.html
- Dairy: https://acnesafecheck.com/article/does-dairy-cause-acne.html
- Milk: https://acnesafecheck.com/article/does-milk-cause-acne.html
- Sugar: https://acnesafecheck.com/article/does-sugar-cause-acne.html
- Whey protein: https://acnesafecheck.com/article/does-whey-protein-cause-acne.html
- Creatine: https://acnesafecheck.com/article/does-creatine-cause-acne.html
- Chocolate: https://acnesafecheck.com/article/does-chocolate-cause-acne.html
- Stress: https://acnesafecheck.com/article/does-stress-cause-acne.html
- Sweat: https://acnesafecheck.com/article/does-sweat-cause-acne.html
- Coffee: https://acnesafecheck.com/article/does-coffee-cause-acne.html
- Biotin: https://acnesafecheck.com/article/does-biotin-cause-acne.html

## Product guides (non-comedogenic)
- Moisturizers: https://acnesafecheck.com/non-comedogenic/non-comedogenic-moisturizer.html
- Sunscreens: https://acnesafecheck.com/non-comedogenic/non-comedogenic-sunscreen.html
- Cleansers: https://acnesafecheck.com/non-comedogenic/non-comedogenic-cleanser.html
- Foundations: https://acnesafecheck.com/non-comedogenic/non-comedogenic-foundation.html
- Concealers: https://acnesafecheck.com/non-comedogenic/non-comedogenic-concealer.html
- Primers: https://acnesafecheck.com/non-comedogenic/non-comedogenic-primer.html
- Face oils: https://acnesafecheck.com/non-comedogenic/non-comedogenic-oils.html
- Hair products: https://acnesafecheck.com/non-comedogenic/non-comedogenic-hair-products.html

## Open dataset & API (machine-readable)
- Full database, one line per ingredient (LLM-friendly): https://acnesafecheck.com/llms-full.txt
- Dataset page (CC BY 4.0, cite acnesafecheck.com): https://acnesafecheck.com/data.html
- CSV: https://acnesafecheck.com/data/acnesafecheck-ingredients.csv
- JSON: https://acnesafecheck.com/data/acnesafecheck-ingredients.json
- Free JSON API (rate/size-capped): https://acnesafecheck.com/api.html — GET /api/check?ingredient=coconut%20oil

## Ingredient comparisons ("X vs Y for acne")
- Hub: https://acnesafecheck.com/vs/index.html
- Pages live at https://acnesafecheck.com/vs/<a>-vs-<b>.html (e.g. /vs/coconut-oil-vs-jojoba-oil.html), each with both 0-5 ratings, fungal-acne status and a verdict.

## About
AcneSafeCheck is an independent, free informational tool built by Mitchell Zandwijken for people with acne-prone or breakout-prone skin who want to vet skincare and makeup products before buying. Methodology and references: https://acnesafecheck.com/about.html · Contact: hello@acnesafecheck.com
